title: How to reset a student's password
content:
To reset a student's password:

  1. Open the User Lookup tab
  2. Search for the student by name or email
  3. Click their email address
  4. In the User Management tab, click Send Password Reset
  5. The student will receive an email with a reset link

Note: Password reset links expire after 1 hour.

title: Disabling two-factor authentication for users
content:
If a user is locked out of their account due to 2FA issues:

  1. Search for the user in User Lookup
  2. Click their email to open User Management
  3. Click Disable 2FA
  4. Confirm the action

The user will be able to log in with just their password. They should re-enable 2FA from their settings page after logging in.

title: Understanding subscription tiers
content:
Tklesson offers five subscription tiers for schools:

  • Tier 1: 1–50 students — $350/month or $4,000/year
  • Tier 2: 51–100 students — $500/month or $5,500/year
  • Tier 3: 101–200 students — $800/month or $8,500/year
  • Tier 4: 201–500 students — $1,200/month or $12,500/year
  • Tier 5: 500+ students — $2,000/month or $22,000/year

All tiers include unlimited teachers, full gradebook access, and quiz monitoring. Yearly plans save up to 17%.

title: How tutors set their availability
content:
Tutors can set their weekly availability from their dashboard:

  1. Navigate to Settings in the tutor dashboard
  2. Under Availability, select days and time slots
  3. Click Save

Students will only see available time slots when booking sessions. If all slots are full, the tutor appears as unavailable.
